videos.title: HTML Attributes Explained
videos.description: Learn all about HTML attributes including global attributes, boolean attributes, and how to use data attributes effectively.

videos.title: HTML Crash Course - Attributes & Links
videos.description: Brad Traversy covers HTML attributes, links, images, and form attributes with practical examples.

videos.title: ARIA HTML Attributes for Accessibility
videos.description: A comprehensive guide to using ARIA attributes to make web content more accessible to screen readers.

videos.title: HTML data-* Attributes Tutorial
videos.description: Learn how to use custom data attributes in HTML to store extra information and access it with JavaScript.

videos.title: HTML Form Attributes - All You Need to Know
videos.description: A complete walkthrough of HTML form attributes including validation, input types, and accessibility features.
